Let me check the Node version more carefully - Node 20.15.0 should support this. Actually, `constants` was added to `node:fs/promises` in Node 20.something. Let me check.

Actually, looking at this more carefully, `fs/promises` exports `constants` starting from Node.js v21.x or maybe a specific v20.x patch. Node 20.15.0 might not have it.


I have a few options here: upgrade Node to a newer version, downgrade the `open` package to something compatible with Node 20, or disable the auto-open feature in the webpack dev server configuration. Let me look into whether I can just turn off the auto-open behavior.
